title: Leaderboard
dbOfflineHint: ELO rankings are temporarily unavailable. Gameplay is unaffected; data will appear once the database is back.
loadFailed: Failed to load leaderboard, please check server connection
groupEmpty: No players in this group yet

v3.title: 8-Metric Leaderboard
v3.subtitle: Edward 8 metrics. Entry: each ability role ≥ 3 games, loyalist ≥ 15 games.
v3.rawHint: Direct sample mean. Low-game players may look high/low.
v3.shrinkHint: Posterior shrunk toward population mean for low-game players.

tooltips.threeRed: 3-Red rate (when on red role) = 3-Red outcome / red games
tooltips.threeBlueDead: 3B-Dead rate (when on red role) = 3-Blue-Dead / red games
tooltips.threeBlueAlive: 3B-Alive rate (when on blue role) = 3-Blue-Alive / blue games
tooltips.expectedWin: ExpectedWin = Σ red RedWin·P(red) + Σ blue BlueWin·P(blue)
tooltips.precision: PrecisionWR = Σ_role Σ_seat P(role)·P(seat)·WR(role,seat) with cell α=5 shrinkage
